column2: Ailments are debilitating, stackable conditions. They are inflicted by enemies through attacks, defenses, environmental hazards, or abilities and can progressively worsen if not addressed. Ailments are always negative in nature, gradually reducing combat effectiveness, health, or mobility over time. Ailments can be resisted, and are typically removed or reduced by resting actions such as sitting or laying.
